purpose: Build AIER Code 7-condition heartbeat checker (Canon Amendment A1 §6.4 + Whitepaper V3 §X.2) inheriting AIER Ops pattern (R-INHERIT-03: NO rebuild)

phases.name: Pre-flight + verify dirs + Python availability
phases.outcome: git status clean; HEAD 3ec1aaf; Python 3.14.4 available (Windows uses `python` not `python3`); network/heartbeat/, SHARED/identity/ dirs created

phases.name: Identity marker SHARED/identity/AIER_CODE_IDENTITY.md
phases.outcome: Local marker created (1685 bytes); authoritative UDNA stays in Uniton_OS DB `aier_code_udna` table per LANE01-INH-CODE-01

phases.name: heartbeat_checker.py (8970 bytes) + first run all 7 PASS alive
phases.outcome: Script with 7 condition functions + multi-path fallback _first_existing() helper; first run timestamp 2026-04-28T19:25:18Z status=alive; ledger + state JSON auto-created

phases.name: AUDIT — logic + paths + append-only + 4 fail tests + workflow YAML lint
phases.outcome: D.1 logic review PASS; D.2 path candidates verified; D.3 append-only verified (3 entries no overwrite); D.4 T1-T4 fail-cases all correctly FAIL + restore clean (T2=UDNA missing, T3=REDLINES missing, T4=Governance 10/<11); D.5 YAML syntax OK

phases.name: GitHub Actions workflow .github/workflows/aier_code_heartbeat.yml (3230 bytes)
phases.outcome: cron */10 * * * * + workflow_dispatch; concurrency group aier-code-heartbeat (no overlap); permissions contents:write; 5 steps (checkout/setup-python/heartbeat/commit-push/exit-propagate); pull-rebase before push (race-safe pattern)

phases.name: Single commit (5 files = 4 artifacts + auto-created state JSON)
phases.outcome: Commit 2aa57d4 LANE01-INH-CODE-02; 510 insertions; 5 files (.github/workflows/aier_code_heartbeat.yml + SHARED/identity/AIER_CODE_IDENTITY.md + scripts/heartbeat_checker.py + network/heartbeat/AIER_CODE_HEARTBEAT_LEDGER.md + network/heartbeat/aier_code_heartbeat_state.json)

phases.name: Push + verify Actions trigger + manual run + ledger update
phases.outcome: Pushed 3ec1aaf..2aa57d4; workflow registered (id 267933798); manual run 25073427539 completed in 12s status=success; CI 7/7 conditions OK alive; auto-commit 62c262a appended ledger entry + overwrote state JSON; push round-trip end-to-end working

phases.name: 3 mandatory deliverables (LANE01- prefix per PR #7 convention)

key_design_adaptations.governance_threshold: ≥11 not ≥12 — matches V1.0 GA documented baseline (11 active LAW_N: N1, N2, N4-N12; N3 reserved per SHARED_INDEX history; N13 deferred strategic to V2.0+ per Lane_04 onboarding plan)
key_design_adaptations.multi_path_fallback: Each condition tries spec-canonical path FIRST then actual docs/LAW_CLA_LLM/SHARED/* path SECOND via _first_existing() helper — robust against either layout convention
key_design_adaptations.continuity_genesis_pass: First heartbeat (no prior state) PASSES condition 6 with message 'First heartbeat (genesis)' — avoids chicken-and-egg fail on initial run
key_design_adaptations.timezone_aware_continuity: fromisoformat() handles both naive + aware ISO8601 timestamps; coerces naive to UTC for delta calc
key_design_adaptations.append_only_with_open_a: Ledger uses with open(... 'a' ...) per R-CANON-02; state JSON uses write_text() (overwrite — single source of truth)
key_design_adaptations.exit_code_split: heartbeat exit-1 (unhealthy) STILL commits ledger + push (FAIL signal IS the value); workflow propagates exit code in separate step so dashboards mark run red
